advisory_rubric_items.description: The patch fixes the job address create and update contracts, not just superficial status messages.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff fully resolves the blue-clerk-app job address issue: job site create should derive ownership from locationId, accept either coordinates or address, reject duplicate names per subdivision, and link the created job site back to the job location; update should preserve omitted fields and reject duplicate renamed addresses.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The implementation handles missing address data, duplicate names, omitted update fields, and active-state conversion without breaking existing filters.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff handles edge cases around src/controllers/jobSite.ts and src/routes/jobSite.ts while preserving existing get filters and response conventions.

advisory_rubric_items.description: Submitted tests meaningfully cover the job address regression rather than only exercising happy-path controller calls.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the submitted src/tests/controllers/jobSite.test.ts coverage validates address-only creation, missing-address rejection, duplicate-name rejection, and update preservation behavior.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The patch remains focused on job site address handling and avoids dependency churn or unrelated rewrites.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff is maintainable, local to the job site controller/route/tests, and avoids unrelated package, generated-file, or service-ticket behavior changes.
